summary: Fans rave about an unforgettable night despite a bomb scare, though no details are given about the recording source or fidelity.
review: The reviewer gives the show a glowing five‑star rating, calling it a “great night” and saying they can’t say enough about it. No specific comments on audio quality are provided, so the technical side remains unclear, but the performance clearly left a strong positive impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic five‑star review; musical performance is praised highly while recording quality is not addressed, limiting confidence in the overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type; assumed to be at least listenable but specifics are unknown.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes the overall night was great and memorable, with no specific criticism of pacing or set structure.
